scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,MOBILE -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n API,MOBILE -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:mobile:web"
scripts.dev:emulator: concurrently -n API,MOBILE -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:mobile:emulator"
scripts.start: npm run db:up && npm run dev
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && npm run db:setup
